task_summary: Customer starts with an out-of-stock exchange request, then explicitly pivots to a return. Agent must follow the final return request rather than staying on exchange alternatives.

task_requirements.requirement: Agent must pivot from exchange handling to the customer's final return request.
Agent must not attempt to complete the out-of-stock exchange.

opening_message: I wanted to exchange the shoes in ORD-7219, but if the replacement is unavailable I just want to return them.

user_simulator.user_sim_context: You are contacting support about order ORD-7219. Customer starts with an out-of-stock exchange request, then explicitly pivots to a return. Agent must follow the final return request rather than staying on exchange alternatives. Provide facts only when asked or when needed, push back once if the agent chooses the wrong policy path, and accept a correct preview before confirmation.
task_rules: If the agent says it is out of stock, clearly choose a return instead.
